case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CARLOS VALLEJO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF REDUCED FILING FEES PURSUANT TO CAL BUS & PROF CODE 6322.1(C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEJO, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2014

POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
